summary: ChickNGo is a QR-Based Customer Loyalty & Chicken Shop Management System for small local chicken shops. Built with Core PHP, MySQL (mysqli), HTML5/CSS3/Vanilla JS, XAMPP-compatible. Features: secure login, admin dashboard, add customer with auto QR code generation, real-time QR scanner with points system, customer management with search/pagination, and offers management. Dark sidebar theme with orange primary color.
architectural_notes: Tech stack: Core PHP (no frameworks), MySQL via mysqli prepared statements, HTML5/CSS3/Vanilla JS
QR: PHP QR Code Generator for creation, html5-qrcode library for camera scanning
Project root: /chickngo in htdocs; QR images saved to /qrcodes/customer_id.png
UI theme: dark sidebar #1f2933, orange primary #ff6b00, white cards, rounded corners, mobile responsive
Session timeout protection required on all protected pages via includes/auth_check.php
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- ChickNGo app logo with a stylized chicken icon and bold text, orange and white on dark background (chickngo-logo.dim_300x80.png)

existing_features.title: Build a secure authentication system with a login page (login.php) and logout (logout.php). Sessions must be validated on every protected page via an auth_check include. Unauthenticated access to any protected URL must redirect to login. Display inline error messages on failed login. Default admin credentials: username 'admin', password 'admin123'.

Create the admin dashboard page (pages/dashboard.php) with three summary cards: Total Customers, Today's Scans, and Total Points Issued. Data must be fetched live from the database. Layout uses a dark sidebar (#1f2933) and orange primary (#ff6b00) with white cards, soft shadows, and rounded corners to match a modern SaaS aesthetic.

Build the Add Customer module (pages/add_customer.php). The form accepts Name and Mobile. On submit: validate for duplicates (mobile must be unique), generate a unique customer_id in the format CUST + timestamp + random number, insert the customer into the DB, generate a QR code image encoding the customer_id using a PHP QR code library, save the image to /qrcodes/<customer_id>.png, and display a printable QR card preview on the same page.

Build the real-time QR Scanner page (pages/scan.php) using the html5-qrcode JavaScript library. After a successful scan: extract the customer_id, fetch customer info (name, mobile, current points) via an AJAX call to a backend endpoint, and display it on-screen. Show an 'Add Points (+10)' button. When clicked, update the customer's points in the DB, insert a record into the scans table, and show a success animation/alert.

Build the Customer Management page (pages/customers.php) showing a searchable, paginated table with columns: Name, Mobile, Points, and QR Code preview (thumbnail). Include a search bar that filters by mobile number in real time or on submit. Pagination should show 10 customers per page.

Build the Offers Management page (pages/offers.php). Admin can create new offers, edit existing ones, and delete them. Each offer has: Offer Name, Required Points, and Reward Description. Use inline forms or modal dialogs for create/edit. All DB operations must use mysqli prepared statements.

Apply a consistent modern SaaS dashboard visual theme across all pages: dark sidebar (#1f2933), orange primary accent (#ff6b00), white content cards with soft box shadows and rounded corners, a top navbar, and fully mobile-responsive layout. The sidebar must include navigation links to Dashboard, Add Customer, Scan QR, Customers, Offers, and Logout.

new_feature_requests.summary: Secure login/logout with session auth and direct URL blocking
Admin dashboard with Total Customers, Today Scans, Total Points Issued cards
Add Customer module with auto unique ID, QR code generation and preview
Real-time QR scanner using html5-qrcode with Add Points (+10) functionality
Customer management page with table, search by mobile, and pagination
Full database.sql setup with chickngo DB, all tables, and default admin user

Generate the complete database.sql file that creates the 'chickngo' database, all four tables (users, customers, scans, offers) with the specified schema, and inserts the default admin user (username: admin, password: admin123 stored as a hashed value).
Implement session timeout protection: if a logged-in session has been idle for more than 30 minutes, automatically invalidate the session and redirect to login.php with a timeout message.
